title: Enilive Begins SAF Production at its Plant in Gela (Sicily), Capable of Meeting One Third of Europeâ€™s Demand
content: Enilive announces the commissioning of its first plant to produce Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) at the Gela biorefinery, in Sicily. Production has started at the plant, which has a capacity of 400,000 tonnes per year, representing almost a third of the expected European SAF demand in 2025, following the implementation of the ReFuelEU Aviation regulation.
author: Analysts Account
